violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of bio-film. Ice machine to be emptied and sanitized by end of day. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2025

The floor behind the walk-in cooler has an accumulation of old rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2024
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector printed procedures for establishment. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2023
The Handwash sink in the bar area is lacking signage. The hand wash sink must be labeled for handwashing only. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2023
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the bar area. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2023
